abilities.name: Insects!!!
abilities.desc: You have +1D when inflicting harm or violence against human opponents.

abilities.name: I'll take you down with me
abilities.desc: Regain 1 psyche burst when you take an injury, fill out a hook, or take an affliction.

abilities.name: Rule of Nature
abilities.desc: When you inflict violence with an action, if you roll two or more 6s, the action inflicts 1 more slash on any talismans and you regain 1 psyche burst.

abilities.name: Red Muscle
abilities.desc: You can take 2 nonlethal stress to gain +1D on any violent or forceful roll.

abilities.name: Bare Teeth
abilities.desc: While you have two or more injuries or afflictions, it is no longer hard to use mundane capabilities against supernatural forces. Your human physical abilities are at 1/2 CAT instead of CAT 0.

abilities.name: Xenoflesh
abilities.desc: Transform your flesh in unnatural ways. (OCR corrupted)

abilities.name: Humanity's Last Breath
abilities.desc: Pick a sin mark you have. Evolve that Sin mark. It no longer modifies resistance rolls.

abilities.name: Quickening
abilities.desc: When you gain 2 or more Sin as part of an action, your action gains +1D.

abilities.name: Sympathetic Mutation
abilities.desc: You may take 1d3 sin to grant an ally the benefits of any sin mark ability you have for one scene. Their body is infected by a lesser version of it that dissipates when the scene is over.

abilities.name: Metamorphosis
abilities.desc: Between missions or when resting, you can gain 1 sin to re-roll the ability of one of your sin marks. Ignore '1's rolled for gaining. If you roll an ability you already have, choose one instead.

abilities.name: Jack!
abilities.desc: At the start of a mission, choose a skill you have at 0. You can improve it to 1 for the duration of this mission only.

abilities.name: Always a way
abilities.desc: If there isn't an entrance or exit into a place, you can find one. You can always get through, but (Admin picks one): it's dangerous or risky, it'll only fit one person, you'll have to leave something or someone behind.

abilities.name: Oilfinger
abilities.desc: You start a mission with 1d3+1 extra Kit Points.

abilities.name: Extra Parts
abilities.desc: You can mark 1 KP for +1D on any roll that involves fixing, crafting, breaking, or modifying devices or machines.

abilities.name: Weak Spot
abilities.desc: When an ally performs violent or forceful action, you can grant them +1D on their action, and +1 slash on any talismans on success. You have one use of this ability, which resets when you rest, and a roll can only benefit from this once.

abilities.name: Iron Wall
abilities.desc: When you defend someone close to you in a conflict scene, you can choose to divert any consequences taken by your target onto you instead of its usual effects. The second time or more you use this in the same scene, you take 1d3 nonlethal stress first.

abilities.name: The Excessive Agony of Moving Forward
abilities.desc: Erase 1 stress when pressure increases if you have more than 3.

abilities.name: Castle
abilities.desc: When any ally takes an injury, you erase 1 stress and gain +1D on your next action.

abilities.name: Centerweight
abilities.desc: When resting, allies that spend resting dice can set the results of their dice to yours instead.

abilities.name: Painkiller
abilities.desc: Your first injury taken does not reduce maximum stress.

abilities.name: Dust to Dust
abilities.desc: Stress no longer rolls over when you take an injury (excess is lost).

abilities.name: Silent Strike
abilities.desc: Gain +1D on forceful actions taken against targets who are unaware of your presence.

abilities.name: I'll do it myself
abilities.desc: Once a scene, when someone fails a roll, you can step in to help them, as long as you are able. You gain 1d3+1 nonlethal stress, but roll 1D and add it to the total roll, which could cause it to succeed.

abilities.name: Rook
abilities.desc: When you successfully set up an ally, you can take 2 nonlethal stress to set up another ally of your choice with the same action.

abilities.name: It's Nothing
abilities.desc: You can ignore taking an injury by saying 'It's Nothing'. Erase half your stress (instead of all from gaining an injury), then gain a hook 'It's Nothing'. This hook fills up any time you say 'It's Nothing' as well as the normal ways (taking this hook again, pressure increasing, rolling a '1' on risk). Segments on the hook can't be erased in any way. When the hook fills out, you collapse and suffer instant death, which you cannot ignore. If you end a mission with this hook, you gain a permanent cosmetic scar.

abilities.name: Black Suit
abilities.desc: Gain +1D on actions to lead, intimidate, or give orders to mundane humans.

abilities.name: Mea Culpa
abilities.desc: The first time in a hunt you take an injury or an affliction, relieve 1d3+1 sin.

abilities.name: Eliminate the Stain
abilities.desc: Gain +1D and inflict +1 slash on talismans the first time you roll against sins that have half or less of their execution talisman remaining.

abilities.name: Single Minded
abilities.desc: You can only be affected by one affliction maximum (you can choose which to discard and keep).

abilities.name: By the Book
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, when you witness or find evidence of a sin's Domain, you can force the Admin to show you the exact rules text of that Domain.

machine.name: Machine
machine.desc: If your group rests, you can choose to exclude yourself from resting.
normal: Put the work before your own needs

abilities.name: The Work
abilities.desc: You can choose to gain +1D on any roll. If you do, take 1 stress for each time you've used this ability this mission (including this one). You can't use this ability for the remainder of the hunt if you rest.

abilities.name: Brain Burst
abilities.desc: When investigating or researching something, you can take 1 nonlethal stress to re-roll one die on your action roll. The re-roll is final.

abilities.name: Second Wind
abilities.desc: When pressure hits 4, erase all stress or remove an affliction.

abilities.name: Overtime
abilities.desc: You can gain +1D on all actions to investigate, analyze, or gather information for the duration of a scene, but you lose the use of this ability and all other activities are hard until you rest.

abilities.name: Neat Little Universe
abilities.desc: Twice a hunt, outside conflict, you can adjust any talisman on your sheet or an ally's up or down by 1.

moth.name: Moth
normal: Uncover hidden or uncomfortable truths about the world
bold: Uncover hidden or uncomfortable truths about yourself

abilities.name: Psyche Jewel
abilities.desc: The first time a hunt you or an ally answers a Sin's trauma question, regain 1 psyche burst, recover 1 sin, and erase 1 stress.

abilities.name: Alienation
abilities.desc: Your sin overflow cap increases. (OCR corrupted; likely +1 or +2)

abilities.name: Rapture
abilities.desc: You erase 1 stress when you gain an affliction, injury, or hook.

abilities.name: Larval
abilities.desc: If you end a mission at 7 sin or higher, gain 1 xp. If you suffer sin overflow, gain 1 xp.

abilities.name: Unveil
abilities.desc: You can ask the Admin about a character present 'What is this person afraid of?'. Gain +1D when you act on the answers for the rest of the scene, then lose the use of this ability until you rest.

abilities.name: Joy Luck Wind Thrower
abilities.desc: When you take any action in a conflict scene, it's never hard. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Hot Blood
abilities.desc: Gain +1D when next taking action in a conflict scene. (OCR corrupted)

abilities.name: Font of Power
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, you may give an ally up to 3 psyche bursts, which could put you over your max. Until you rest, you cannot regain those psyche bursts on your own. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Recollect
abilities.desc: At the end of a session, if something another character did impressed you, you can give that character 1 xp. Characters can only gain this xp once per session. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Strive
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, you can make a complete re-roll of any action you or an ally just took, taking the second result as final. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Healer
abilities.desc: The first time you rest in a hunt, gain an extra resting die.

abilities.name: Focused
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, you may use a blasphemy power that affects only you or your allies without spending psyche burst, and it gains +1 CAT.

abilities.name: Savior Complex
abilities.desc: Gain +1D on actions to directly prevent or avoid harm to humans.

abilities.name: Care
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, outside of a conflict scene, you can roll and apply a resting die to yourself or another nearby ally without resting.

abilities.name: Gentleness
abilities.desc: For one scene, you may take 1 less stress when you take stress. This ability breaks if you take any forceful or harmful action. Then lose the use of this ability until you rest.

abilities.name: Catch Up
abilities.desc: If your rival has less stress than you when pressure increases, erase 1 stress. If they have more psyche bursts, regain 1 psyche burst.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.desc: When you set up your rival, you take 1 nonlethal stress and +1D on the action to set up.

abilities.name: You Can't Die Now
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, if your rival would take an injury or suffer instant death, you can take 2d3 stress to allow them to ignore it. They go to 1 stress under maximum.

abilities.name: Shadow Seed
abilities.desc: Choose a blasphemy power your rival has. You can use that power this hunt, but only at max CAT 0.

abilities.name: Pincer Technique
abilities.desc: When you participate in teamwork with your rival, you take 1 nonlethal stress, but can also re-roll one of the dice once, taking the second result as final.

abilities.name: Will to Live
abilities.desc: +1 max stress. 1 in 6 chance of ignoring instant death (roll 1d6). (May be a separate SURVIVOR agenda ability per other sources.)

abilities.name: Perfect Technique
abilities.desc: Pick a blasphemy power. Once a hunt, you can increase the CAT of that blasphemy by +1 temporarily for an entire scene, or for two rounds if it's a conflict scene.

abilities.name: Cantrip
abilities.desc: Pick a blasphemy ability. You use it twice a hunt without spending a psyche burst, but all parameters are at a max of CAT 0 if used this way.

abilities.name: Finishing Move
abilities.desc: Pick a blasphemy power. You can increase the dice and CAT of that power by +1 the next time you use it, but you then cannot use any blasphemies again and all actions are hard. Both these effects end when you rest.

abilities.name: Mimic Technique
abilities.desc: Pick a power from any Blasphemy, without having taken that blasphemy. It doesn't change your xp or sin overflow caps.

abilities.name: Weave
abilities.desc: When you use a blasphemy, you may increase the CAT of the next blasphemy used by an ally against the same target by +1, and grant it +1D on any rolls. Then lose the use of this ability until you rest.

songbird.name: Songbird
normal: Get someone to do your bidding

abilities.name: Codependency
abilities.desc: When someone sets you up, you can trade 1 stress around (from you to them, or vice versa).

abilities.name: Spiral
abilities.desc: You can always tell if someone is lying to you, though not the nature of the lie.

abilities.name: Strings
abilities.desc: When you rest with a consenting partner, you can spend quality time with them (the nature of which is up to them). If they choose to do so, they add +1 to all your resting results. However, until you next rest, you can force them to participate in teamwork with you or set you up once.

abilities.name: White Fiber
abilities.desc: You can take 2 nonlethal stress to gain +1D on any roll to lie or manipulate someone.

abilities.name: Fascination
abilities.desc: You can declare your fascination with another character in the group at the start of any hunt. When that character rolls a 6 on risk, you lose 1 stress. When they roll a 1, you gain 1 nonlethal stress.

demon.name: Demon
demon.desc: You can spend scrip as kit points.

abilities.name: Black Market Stims
abilities.desc: You can spend 2 scrip at the start of a mission as a psyche burst. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Supplier Connections
abilities.desc: You get a discount on all kit and aesthetic items, a minimum of 1. This discount does not apply to items at CAT 4+. (OCR partially corrupted)

abilities.name: Shady Lender
abilities.desc: Between missions, you can choose to gain 1d3 scrip, but start the next mission with 1 injury.

abilities.name: Heartless
abilities.desc: You gain +1 scrip for executing sins.

abilities.name: Spotless
abilities.desc: Once a mission, you can destroy an aesthetic kit expansion you own worth 3 or more scrip instead of suffering an injury.

abilities.name: Ripped at the Seams
abilities.desc: After pressure increases during a mission, mark off 1d3 sin boxes. When you sin overflow, you can always choose between losing and keeping control. Retire your exorcist after the current mission is over. Face execution or exile. There’s nothing left for you here.

abilities.name: Flop
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, you can throw yourself to the ground. While in this state humans, sins, and exorcists will treat you as if you were dead, severely ill, or unconscious. It may distract them, and they won’t target you in a conflict scene.

abilities.name: Soft
abilities.desc: You roll -1d for hard actions, but always gain +1d for straight rolls.

abilities.name: Pincushion
abilities.desc: Exorcists in short range from you can always take injuries or afflictions in your place. If they do, they gain 1 xp, but no more than once a mission.

abilities.name: Tagalong
abilities.desc: When you participate in teamwork, the leader of the roll always takes 2 nonlethal stress, but always gains +1D.

abilities.name: Daydream
abilities.desc: At the start of any conflict scene, you can recover all your stress. If you do, roll a max of 1d on actions for the rest of the scene.

cradle.name: Cradle
normal: Protect your ward from the consequences of their actions

abilities.name: Matriphagy
abilities.desc: Your ward can deal 3 nonlethal but irreducible stress to you in place of a psyche burst as long as they are in short range of you.

abilities.name: Coddle
abilities.desc: Once a conflict scene, you may take the defend or aid action for free, targeting only your ward. This doesn’t take your action for the round.

abilities.name: Fragile
abilities.desc: You gain +2 max stress, but can no longer clear stress by any means other than taking an injury.

abilities.name: Sin Eater
abilities.desc: Once a hunt, when you give your ward a warm gesture (a smile, a hug, a pat on the head), you can transfer any amount of stress and up to one affliction or hook from them to you.

abilities.name: Offering
abilities.desc: As long as you are in short range from your ward, you can gain 1d3+1 sin to prevent any injury to your ward, or 1d6+2 to prevent instant death.
